entries.title: Java 21 LTS
entries.description: Current LTS baseline at Devoxx and Voxxed: virtual threads, pattern matching, and records for cloud-native services.

entries.title: Kotlin
entries.description: JVM language with first-class presence on Devoxx stages; strong fit for concise services and multiplatform experiments.

entries.title: Quarkus
entries.description: Cloud-native Java stack featured in Red Hat and community conference labs; powers the workshop People REST API.

entries.title: Spring Boot 3
entries.description: Dominant Java application framework at Voxxed and Devoxx; Jakarta EE baseline with mature observability and data integrations.

entries.title: React
entries.description: Component model for modern web UIs; common choice in full-stack and frontend tracks at European developer conferences.

entries.title: Kubernetes
entries.description: De facto runtime for conference demos on cloud-native Java, GitOps, and platform engineering.

entries.title: OpenShift
entries.description: Enterprise Kubernetes platform used in workshop deployments and frequent Voxxed hands-on sessions.

entries.title: PostgreSQL
entries.description: Relational database of choice for persistence talks, Testcontainers workshops, and the People Service.

entries.title: Keycloak
entries.description: OIDC/OAuth2 provider recurring in security and identity sessions; secures the workshop stack.

entries.title: Apache Kafka
entries.description: Event streaming backbone in microservices, CQRS, and reactive architecture talks at Devoxx.

entries.title: Argo CD
entries.description: GitOps continuous delivery for Kubernetes — declarative sync from Git, used in the workshop for People Service manifests and a staple of platform engineering talks.

entries.title: Red Hat Developer Hub
entries.description: Internal developer portal (Backstage) for catalog, templates, Tech Radar, and golden paths — a platform engineering showcase.

entries.title: OpenTelemetry
entries.description: Vendor-neutral observability standard replacing one-off tracing talks; pairs with Micrometer and Quarkus/Spring.

entries.title: JUnit 5
entries.description: Default unit and integration testing stack in virtually every Java conference lab and codebase.

entries.title: OpenAPI
entries.description: Contract-first API design promoted in microservices and API craftsmanship sessions; published from the People backend.

entries.title: Testcontainers
entries.description: Integration testing with real PostgreSQL, Kafka, and Keycloak containers — a Devoxx crowd favorite since 2019.

entries.title: LangChain4j
entries.description: Java framework for LLM-powered features; dominant AI-for-developers topic at recent Devoxx and Voxxed editions.

entries.title: GraalVM Native Image
entries.description: Ahead-of-time compilation for fast startup and lower memory — recurring Quarkus and Micronaut conference deep dives.

entries.title: Virtual Threads
entries.description: Project Loom in Java 21+; high-throughput I/O without reactive complexity — headline topic since Devoxx 2023.

entries.title: AI-Assisted Development
entries.description: Copilot-style coding assistants and in-IDE agents reshaping how teams build and review software at conference keynotes.

entries.title: Platform Engineering
entries.description: Product-minded internal platforms, golden paths, and IDPs — growing track at Voxxed Days and Devoxx Belgium.

entries.title: GitHub Actions
entries.description: CI/CD pipelines for Java and frontend builds; integrated in the workshop via the Developer Hub CI tab.

entries.title: Serverless Workflows
entries.description: CNCF Serverless Workflow spec and SonataFlow for orchestrating multi-step processes — used in the create-person workshop flow.

entries.title: Micronaut
entries.description: Compile-time dependency injection and GraalVM-friendly microservices; regular alternative to Quarkus in conference comparisons.

entries.title: Spring AI
entries.description: Spring ecosystem approach to LLM integration; assess alongside LangChain4j for new AI features.

entries.title: WebAssembly
entries.description: Portable bytecode for browser and server runtimes; emerging in performance and polyglot talks at Voxxed frontend tracks.

entries.title: Angular
entries.description: Enterprise SPA framework still featured in full-stack conference sessions; assess for greenfield UIs vs React.

entries.title: Java on WASM
entries.description: Experimental GraalWasm and TeaVM paths for running JVM languages in the browser — early-stage conference demos.

entries.title: Eclipse Store
entries.description: Object persistence engine gaining attention in Java performance and architecture sessions as an alternative to ORM-heavy stacks.

entries.title: Java 25
entries.description: Latest Java feature release with preview and incubator capabilities; evaluate on non-production workloads before the next LTS cycle.

entries.title: Service Mesh
entries.description: Istio, Linkerd, and OpenShift Service Mesh for mTLS, traffic management, and observability between microservices — pilot on new platform services first.

entries.title: Argo Rollouts
entries.description: Progressive delivery controller for canary, blue-green, and analysis-driven deployments; pairs naturally with Argo CD GitOps in the workshop stack.

entries.title: vLLM
entries.description: High-throughput LLM inference engine with PagedAttention and OpenAI-compatible APIs — popular for self-hosted model serving on GPU clusters.

entries.title: Model-as-a-Service
entries.description: Centralized LLM and embedding endpoints consumed by applications via API gateways — standardize quotas, routing, and observability for AI workloads.

entries.title: LLM Deployment (LLMD)
entries.description: Operational patterns for packaging, scaling, and governing large language models in production — from model registry to SLOs and safe rollout.

entries.title: Digital Sovereignty
entries.description: Data residency, EU cloud regions, and vendor-independent stacks so platforms meet sovereignty and compliance requirements without sacrificing developer experience.

entries.title: Java 8
entries.description: Legacy baseline without virtual threads or modern security updates — avoid for new services discussed at current conferences.

entries.title: Manual kubectl deploys
entries.description: Imperative one-off deployments without GitOps; contradicts platform engineering practices promoted at Devoxx.

entries.title: Shared-database microservices
entries.description: Tight coupling via a single schema across services — repeatedly flagged as an anti-pattern in distributed systems talks.

rings.name: ADOPT
rings.description: Production-ready staples you hear in keynotes and repeat across Devoxx and Voxxed editions.

rings.name: TRIAL
rings.description: Hot conference tracks worth piloting on a real team with a clear learning goal.

rings.name: ASSESS
rings.description: Emerging topics from recent labs and BOF sessions — explore before committing.

rings.name: HOLD
rings.description: Patterns conference speakers warn against for new greenfield work.
